login.title: Player Portal
login.subtitle: Sign in to view your tournaments, scores and league standings
login.appleIdentityTokenError: Apple did not return an identity token. Please try again.
login.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter your email and password

register.title: Create Player Account
register.subtitle: Register to track your scores and join leagues
register.verificationLinkSentTo: We've sent a verification link to
register.activateAccountInstructions: Click the link in the email to activate your account, then sign in here.
register.verificationEmailFailedFallback: Your account was created, but we couldn't send the verification email right now. Sign in and use "Resend verification email" to get a new link.
register.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll send a reset link to your registered email address
forgotPassword.sentBodySuffix: , we've sent a password reset link. It expires in 1 hour.

resendVerification.title: Resend Verification
resendVerification.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send a new verification link.
resendVerification.sentBody: A new verification link has been sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
